title: SEO Content Strategy
description: Keyword research → topic cluster → strategy brief. Uses DuckDuckGo for SEO research.

nodes.title: Enter Keywords
nodes.prompt: Ask the user: what topic or keywords should we research? Suggest: (A) Enter specific keywords, (B) Describe a topic and I'll find keywords, (C) Browse a competitor URL and I'll extract their keywords.

nodes.title: SEO Research
nodes.prompt: Research the keywords topic. Find: search volume signals, related queries, search intent, competitor content ranking. Use DuckDuckGo for web search.

nodes.title: Topic Cluster Brief
nodes.prompt: From the SEO research, build a topic cluster. Identify 1 pillar topic and 3-5 cluster topics. Write a brief for each with reader, pain, belief, point, proof, meaning.

nodes.title: Approve Cluster
nodes.prompt: Show the topic cluster to the user. Ask: (A) Approve all and proceed to content calendar, (B) Approve with edits (let them specify), (C) Reject and refine.

nodes.title: Content Calendar
nodes.prompt: Build a content calendar from the approved cluster. Schedule one post per topic per platform over 2 weeks.
